zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Dagwell於1573年6月12日出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾諾武德時，她的父親Ralph Dagwell23歲，母親Agnes Upton19歲。她於1598年6月5日與John William Covey在英國英格蘭哈普爾諾武德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1642年在英國英格蘭倫敦享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Dagwell于1573年6月12日出生在英国英格兰哈普爾諾武德时，她的父亲Ralph Dagwell23岁，母亲Agnes Upton19岁。她于1598年6月5日与John William Covey在英国英格兰哈普爾諾武德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1642年在英国英格兰倫敦享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dagwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon, Dorset, and Somerset): variant of Backwell, a habitational name from Backwell in Somerset, named with Old English bæc ‘ridge’ + wella ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Dagwell was born on 12 June 1573, in Northwood, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Dagwell, was 23 and her mother, Agnes Upton, was 19. She married John William Covey on 5 June 1598, in Northwood, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1642, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Dagwell est née le 12 juin 1573, à Northwood, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Dagwell, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Agnes Upton, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John William Covey le 5 juin 1598, à Northwood, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1642, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

Juni 1598 in Northwood, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom John William Covey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1642 im Alter von 69 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Northwood, , Isle of Wight, England: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 노르스우드
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Dagwell(이)가 1573년 6월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 노르스우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Dagwell(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Upton(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1598년 6월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 노르스우드에서 John William Covey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1642년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Dagwell родилась 12 июня 1573 г. в местности нортвуд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Dagwell было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Upton, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John William Covey 5 июня 1598 г. в местности нортвуд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1642 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.
